//: Copy the hooks block into your instance's .claude/settings.json. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR resolves to the working folder that holds instance/. cos-onboarding writes the PreToolUse outbound-gate block by default (it is the structural half of propose-never-act); the PostToolUse provenance guard is its inward counterpart.
//pretooluse-gate: PreToolUse outbound-gate (INSTRUCTIONS.md §1): denies any outward MCP call (exit 2) that is not a payload-matched approved proposal at a permissive autonomy dial. Fail-closed. matcher mcp__.* scopes it to connector calls; the hook itself classifies outward-vs-read via outbound_gate.config.json. Necessary, not sufficient — pair with read-only OAuth scopes + sandbox egress deny (engine/docs/write-isolation-config.md).
//pretooluse-core: Optional companion: a PreToolUse deny makes the core/ write-ban PREVENTIVE (the PostToolUse provenance hook is corrective). See engine/docs/write-isolation-config.md.
